title: GitLab Inc (GTLB) Q3 2024 Earnings Call Highlights: Strong Revenue Growth and Strategic AI Advancements
text: GitLab reported strong Q3 2024 financial performance. Revenue reached $196 million, representing 31% increase year-over-year. Non-GAAP operating margin improved to 13.2%, up more than 1,000 basis points annually. Non-GAAP gross margin stood at 91% for the quarter. Dollar-based net retention rate achieved 124%. The company had 1,144 customers with ARR of $100,000+, marking a 31% quarterly increase. GitLab Ultimate now comprises 48% of total annual recurring revenue. SaaS revenue grew 44% year-over-year, reaching 29% of total revenue. AI offerings like Duo Pro and Duo Enterprise are gaining adoption among customers. The company achieved its best quarter in public sector history. Q4 FY25 revenue projected between $205-$206 million. Full fiscal year 2025 revenue guidance ranges from $753-$754 million.
